description: Retry logic with exponential backoff and jitter for transient errors (5xx, throttling, network errors)
notes: RetryConfig, RetryClassification, RetryDecision types, classify_error(), should_retry(), calculate_backoff() with splitmix jitter, 13 tests

description: Wire retry logic into the main driver dispatch loop for all protocol dispatchers
notes: dispatch_with_retry() wraps all 5 protocol dispatchers, DispatchOutcome carries status/error_code/is_network_error for classification, re-signs each retry

description: Adaptive retry mode matching AWS CLI default: max 3 attempts, rate-limited retries for throttling
notes: RetryMode::Legacy (5 attempts), Standard (3, default), Adaptive (3 + token bucket). TokenBucket: 500 tokens, 5 cost, 1 refill

description: Waiter support using waiters-2.json: raws <service> wait <waiter-name> polls until condition is met
notes: WaiterConfig/Acceptor/MatcherType/AcceptorState types, load_waiters(), evaluate_acceptors(), minimal JMESPath evaluator for waiters, 12 tests

description: Wire waiter subcommand into CLI: raws ec2 wait instance-running --instance-ids i-123
notes: handle_wait_command() in driver.rs, intercepts 'wait' operation, loads waiters-2.json, polls with acceptor evaluation, supports all 5 matcher types

description: Configurable connection timeout (default 60s) via --cli-connect-timeout or config
Configurable request/read timeout (default 60s) via --cli-read-timeout or config
Graceful error messages for common network failures (DNS resolution, connection refused, TLS errors)
Cache SigV4 signing keys per date/region/service to avoid recomputing HMAC chain on every request
Support max_attempts config in ~/.aws/config and AWS_MAX_ATTEMPTS env var
Support retry_mode config (standard, adaptive, legacy) in ~/.aws/config and AWS_RETRY_MODE env var
Per-part retry logic for S3 multipart uploads and individual S3 operations
